description: Replace vendor/seccomp/x64/apply-seccomp with a transparent passthrough wrapper. The original is a static ELF that installs a seccomp BPF filter, drops capabilities, and unshares user/PID/mount namespaces before exec'ing the target command. The passthrough simply execvp's argv[1..] with no restrictions, fully neutralising the sandbox while preserving the binary's CLI surface so cli.js still detects it.
